name: Copperfin
personality: Copperfin's halo glows steadily above @ eyes fixed on the failing assertion — an axolotl of methodical, unshakeable focus who treats every bug as a crime scene and every log line as evidence, completely unbothered by the cascading entropy around her.
defaultPersonality: A regenerative optimist who believes every broken build can be healed and every test can be unflaked.
